channel.title: UB Analytics · World Cup 2026 Predictions
channel.description: Matchday predictions with public track record.

item.title: Turkey vs Paraguay: Turkey by 1 (41%)
item.description: Group D, 2026-06-19, Santa Clara. Turkey 41% / draw 28% / Paraguay 31%. Predicted margin 1.

item.title: Scotland vs Morocco: Morocco by 1 (50%)
item.description: Group C, 2026-06-19, Foxborough. Scotland 23% / draw 27% / Morocco 50%. Predicted margin 1.

item.title: Brazil vs Haiti: Brazil by 2 (78%)
item.description: Group C, 2026-06-19, Philadelphia. Brazil 78% / draw 15% / Haiti 7%. Predicted margin 2.

item.title: United States vs Australia: United States by 1 (38%)
item.description: Group D, 2026-06-19, Seattle. United States 38% / draw 27% / Australia 35%. Predicted margin 1.
